eventName.description: Event name this workflow subscribes to (e.g., `'order.created'`, `'user.signup'`). Hosts route events with matching `name` to the registered workflow. Pattern follows the dot-separated convention used elsewhere in the spec.

source.description: Optional source filter. When set, only events from this source trigger the workflow. Sources are host-defined (e.g., `'crm'`, `'billing'`, vendor names).
